name: @sderickson/recipes-dev
description: Docker compose setup for dev environment

scripts.dev: ./scripts/git-hashes.sh && saf-docker generate && docker compose --env-file env.dev --env-file .env --env-file .env.git-hashes -f docker-compose.yaml up --build
scripts.up: ./scripts/git-hashes.sh && saf-docker generate && docker compose --env-file env.dev --env-file .env --env-file .env.git-hashes -f docker-compose.yaml up --build --detach
scripts.down: saf-docker generate && docker compose --env-file env.dev --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yaml down
